title: centaurium pulchellum subsp. ramosissimum
intro: Centaurium pulchellum subsp. ramosissimum, also known as the stellate centaury, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family, characterized by its star-shaped flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Consuming Centaurium pulchellum subsp. ramosissimum may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues due to its sedative and anti-spasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
